case_title: JAMIE CHEN et al VS. PORTFOLIO TO PARADISE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PORTFOLIO TO PARADISE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHEN, JAMIE CHEN, ANDY AS TO DEFENDANT PORTFOLIO TO PARADISE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE QUEENA HO FILED BY CHEN, JAMIE CHEN, ANDY PORTFOLIO TO PARADISE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2013 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-13-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-09-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $45.00) SERVED JAN-09-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PORTFOLIO TO PARADISE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-13-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-13-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY REBECCA LINDSAY--DIRECTOR OF OPERATIONS. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE AND REQUESTING FOR NEW HEARING DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, JAMIE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, JAMIE CHEN, ANDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORTFOLIO TO PARADISE $1,625.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,745.00, THE CONTRACT IS RESCINDED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO REFUND ALL AMOUNTS PAID BY PLAINTIFFS TO DATE AND SHALL NOT COLLECT ANY ADDITIONAL AMOUNTS FROM PLAINTIFFS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
